code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = io.read_line()
match line
when Some(s)
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut sorted = true
  mut i = 1
  let n = parts.len()
  while i < n
    match parts.get(i - 1)
    when Some(a)
      match parts.get(i)
      when Some(b)
        match string.parse_int(a)
        when Some(x)
          match string.parse_int(b)
          when Some(y)
            if x > y
              sorted = false
            end
          when None
            sorted = false
          end
        when None
          sorted = false
        end
      when None
        sorted = false
      end
    when None
      sorted = false
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if sorted
    println("YES")
  else
    println("NO")
  end
when None
  println("YES")
end
